name: Asynchronous Perception Machine For Efficient Test-Time-Training
summary: arXiv:2410.20535v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In this work, we propose Asynchronous Perception Machine (APM), a computationally-efficient architecture for test-time-training (TTT). APM...
description: arXiv:2410.20535v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In this work, we propose Asynchronous Perception Machine (APM), a computationally-efficient architecture for test-time-training (TTT). APM can process patches of an image one at a time in any order asymmetrically and still encode semantic-awareness in the net. We demonstrate APM's ability to recognize out-of-distribution images without d...
author: Rajat Modi, Yogesh Singh Rawat
